name: Rolling Thunder
description: A Torgue MIRV grenade that kicks out three bouncing grenades when it detonates, sending overlapping blast zones across a broad area. Each child can travel a fair distance and ricochet off walls, so it works especially well in large or awkward spaces. Depending on the parts, the fuse can be very short, causing the follow-up blasts to trigger almost immediately after the bounce.
notes: Its name nods to Operation Rolling Thunder, the U.S. bombing campaign during the Vietnam War. The flavor text warns that using it indoors is both impressive and potentially fatal.

special.description: Launches three bouncing grenades that scatter in different directions. Each one detonates after contact and creates overlapping blast zones through its follow-up explosions.
special.title: The thunder shall bring forth the pain!
